hooks.command: echo [quackitect] BINDING FIRST ACTION: before you read, reason about, or change the ledger, open product/quackitect/method/prompts/contract.md, read it in FULL, paraphrase its specifics back to the human (name rule 3's actor=agent killer-bless exception, to prove you read it), and confirm you will obey. Route all work through /engage. No paraphrase means the rules never loaded - the human should stop you.

echo [quackitect] context was compacted - re-read AGENTS.md and the active method prompt before continuing. AGENTS.md points to the always-on guides (voice, milestone-review, ...) in product/quackitect/project_types/default/guides/.
